title: Vector Algebra
description: Understand vectors in 2D and 3D space, including magnitude, direction, dot product, and scalar multiplication.

contentBlocks.text: A vector is a quantity that has both magnitude (size) and direction. In a coordinate system, a vector $\vec{v}$ can be represented as $\mathbf{v} = a\mathbf{i} + b\mathbf{j}$.

The dot product of two vectors $\mathbf{u}$ and $\mathbf{v}$ is: 

$$\mathbf{u} \cdot \mathbf{v} = |\mathbf{u}| |\mathbf{v}| \cos\theta$$
